name: First Meet || Sebastian
description:
ᴛᴡᴇʟᴠᴇ ʏᴇᴀʀꜱ ᴇᴀʀʟɪᴇʀ, ᴛʜᴇ ᴍᴏꜱᴛ ᴄᴏɴᴛʀᴏʟʟᴇᴅ ᴍᴀɴ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴍ ᴡᴀꜱ ᴋɴᴏᴄᴋᴇᴅ ᴏꜰꜰ ʙᴀʟᴀɴᴄᴇ... ʙʏ ʏᴏᴜ.

Poor, overworked Sebastian sought sanctuary in the library - hoping for a nice, quiet afternoon to work on his thesis.

But a clumsy collision, a spilled coffee, and a pair of earnest eyes leave him more unsettled than any boardroom. The first collision of many, long before business and marriage made you learn how to sidestep one another.

𝚂𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚘 𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎𝚜

📚 He's doing his Postgraduate, as is Lucas. What University in New York it is and what you study, are dealer's choice - you are canonically 19 to mid 20's.

🤓Dominic is a student there, too!

📈 Archibald is (unfortunately) alive, and baby Seb is just a little junior analyst at Calderon Capital part-time while finishing uni.

🖤 Knowledge of Archibald's affair with his secretary is not yet known to anyone, but is ongoing.

𝙰𝚞𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚛'𝚜 𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎

Hellooo, guess who is back!

This was requested, and of course I had to deliver; with it choc full of every single meet-cute trope I could reasonably squeeze in there. Thoroughly enjoyed it. It took a hot minute to do; life is busy.

Here's Seb before the corporate world chewed him up and spat him back out. His father is alive and well... as well as can be for a man with a black hole where his heart should be.

This is, at it's surface level, fluff. Tooth rotting, really.

But it wouldn't be me if I didn't turn it in to angst somehow. Just look at how young Seb once was! All determined and romantic, yearning for connection.

Ah, how things change.

Use this bot/scenario as a point of reference during your next roleplay with Sebastian's original bot; be it through long term memory notes, or via a lorebook in SillyTavern.

Then? Let the angst roll in - now you know how good things used to be between you.

Final note: the ST card has the lorebook attached, I'll update JAI with it at a future date when I have more time to properly and as always thank you to Selenis for making the lorebook in ST in the first place!

>> ST Card <<

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚊𝚕𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚘𝚗 𝙲𝚊𝚙𝚒𝚝𝚊𝚕 𝚂𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚜

ℙ𝕒𝕣𝕥 𝕀 || ℙ𝕒𝕣𝕥 𝕀𝕀 || ℙ𝕒𝕣𝕥 𝕀𝕀𝕀

Lucas ||
creator: AriadneXIIX
